# BH Painting Metro Detroit

> Insured professional painters serving homes, businesses, rentals, and multifamily properties throughout Wayne, Oakland, and Macomb counties. Free written estimates are available Monday through Saturday.

## Business

- Name and legal name: BH Painting Metro Detroit
- Website: https://bhpaintingmetrodetroit.com
- Phone: (313) 236-4558
- Email: info@bhpaintingmetrodetroit.com
- Quote email: quotes@bhpaintingmetrodetroit.com
- Location: Metro Detroit, Michigan
- Hours: Monday-Friday 7:00 AM-6:00 PM; Saturday 8:00 AM-2:00 PM; Sunday closed
- Credentials: Insured professional painting business

## Painting services

- Interior painting
- Exterior painting
- Cabinet painting
- Commercial painting
- Deck and fence staining
- Trim and door painting
- Ceiling painting
- Rental turnover painting
- Wallpaper removal
- Color consultation

## Service area

BH Painting Metro Detroit serves Detroit, Dearborn, Warren, Sterling Heights, Troy, Livonia, Royal Oak, Farmington Hills, Clinton Township, and additional communities across the Metro Detroit tri-county area.
